core_mechanism: topologically quantized adiabatic transport, in which a conserved quantity pumped per slow cyclic modulation of a periodic medium is fixed by an integer topological invariant (Chern number) of the band structure, and reverses sign when the adiabatic condition breaks down through instability-driven excitations
brief_reason: The abstract centers on Thouless pumping whose transported amount is set by a Chern number tied to a Bloch topological band, with near-adiabatic ramping triggering finite excitations that reverse propagation direction and thereby switch the topological invariant.
